title: Which Eva would you want to own
display_title: Which Eva would you want to own
wikitext:
[]: Which Eva would you want to own? Post by Unit01Eva » Sun Aug 30, 2009 12:24 pm Which Eva would you want to own? The Original 00, 01 02, 03 with there need of a cord and come with a knife. Or the other design with the s2 organs, regeneration and wings. I like the unit 01 except it doesn't haven't wings and needs a cord to move for more then 5 minutes.

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Aug 30, 2009 12:28 pm None. Because almost all Evas have your mom's soul in them. Ill take my own custom Gundam or make a mecha of my own.

[]: Post by offthechainjoe » Sun Aug 30, 2009 12:42 pm Unit 01's my favorite. And it's unique because it's an Eva made from Lilith and not Adam. Also, prone to some very badass beserker moments.

[]: yeah same here Post by Unit01Eva » Sun Aug 30, 2009 12:43 pm i would probably do that too, when i was writing this i thought which would win in a battle the Evas or the gundams

[]: Re: Which Eva would you want to own? Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 30, 2009 2:53 pm Unit01Eva wrote: Which Eva would you want to own?

[]: Re: Which Eva would you want to own? Post by Xard » Sun Aug 30, 2009 2:55 pm Reichu wrote: Unit01Eva wrote: Which Eva would you want to own?

[]: Post by ath » Sun Aug 30, 2009 2:58 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 30, 2009 3:00 pm Humm I think i'd pass on having one thanks. Ive got issues enough as is

[]: Re: Which Eva would you want to own? Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 30, 2009 3:04 pm Xard wrote: That's why I'd take post-ep19 Eva-01 with S2

[]: Re: Which Eva would you want to own? Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 30, 2009 3:08 pm Xard wrote: Reichu wrote: Unit01Eva wrote: Which Eva would you want to own?

[]: Re: Which Eva would you want to own? Post by ath » Sun Aug 30, 2009 3:10 pm Reichu wrote: Notice that they deploy her with a cable in episode 23? (S2 is for Yui's personal use. Nerv aren't going to fuck with that shit.)

[]: Post by Adekis » Sun Aug 30, 2009 3:24 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: None. Because almost all Evas have your mom's soul in them. Ill take my own custom Gundam or make a mecha of my own.

[]: Post by Cypher » Sun Aug 30, 2009 4:31 pm If moneys an issue you can always whore yourself out to the military. I am sure they would be willing to pay for upkeep and specialized facilities in exchange for some evangelion fire power. Take that terrorists! As far as owning an evangelion goes I would probably want unit-04 just because I like the way it looks.

[]: Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 30, 2009 4:47 pm Cypher wrote: If moneys an issue you can always whore yourself out to the military. I am sure they would be willing to pay for upkeep and specialized facilities in exchange for some evangelion fire power. Take that terrorists! As far as owning an evangelion goes I would probably want unit-04 just because I like the way it looks.

[]: Re: Which Eva would you want to own? Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 30, 2009 5:28 pm ath wrote: They just forgot to attach a cable to EVA-01 in episode 24, then...

[]: Post by Holy Diver » Sun Aug 30, 2009 5:54 pm Cypher wrote: If moneys an issue you can always whore yourself out to the military. I am sure they would be willing to pay for upkeep and specialized facilities in exchange for some evangelion fire power. Take that terrorists!

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Aug 30, 2009 7:15 pm Eva Unit-03. Except it wouldn't have my mom's soul. Instead it would have the soul of my snake. It would be weird and kind of cool to have a deep mental connection with a tame reptile that has no limbs.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Aug 30, 2009 7:41 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Eva Unit-03. Except it wouldn't have my mom's soul. Instead it would have the soul of my snake. It would be weird and kind of cool to have a deep mental connection with a tame reptile that has no limbs.

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Aug 30, 2009 7:47 pm esselfortium wrote: Sammaeloo wrote: Eva Unit-03. Except it wouldn't have my mom's soul. Instead it would have the soul of my snake. It would be weird and kind of cool to have a deep mental connection with a tame reptile that has no limbs.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Aug 30, 2009 7:54 pm I remember in a thread when I first joined the forums I mentioned in some thread if I were to have an Eva or pilot it I'd rather the Eva have the soul of a fly instead of my mother and Reichu responded saying "Why the hell would you want to sync with a fly?" if I remember correctly. Good times.
